description: Scratchpad is a Salesforce workspace that automates CRM updates and note-taking, helping reps keep data clean and spend more time selling.
overview: Scratchpad is a sales workspace built on Salesforce that captures notes, automates CRM updates, and adds coaching, so reps keep records accurate with less admin.
what_is: Scratchpad is a workspace for Salesforce-based sales teams. It strips out admin by capturing notes and updating Salesforce automatically, which frees reps to spend more of their time on revenue-generating work.

It is strongest at CRM accuracy, deal execution, follow-ups, and pipeline visibility, with coaching layered in. It connects instantly to Salesforce and starts streamlining work right away, so cleaner data and better process adherence show up quickly.
Scratchpad sits on top of Salesforce, inheriting its permissions and security. It is not a standalone CRM or a marketing tool; it enhances existing CRM data and makes forecasts more reliable.
